# cache

- **GitHub URL**: <https://github.com/vasic-digital/cache>
- **Description**: Generic reusable Go module: digital.vasic.cache
- **Category**: Messaging + Observability + Storage
- **Status**: Active

## Overview

A generic caching module for Go applications providing in-memory and pluggable cache backends. Supports TTL-based expiration, eviction policies, and thread-safe access patterns.

## Tech Stack

- Language: Go
- Module path: digital.vasic.cache

## Key Features

- Generic in-memory cache with type safety
- TTL-based expiration and eviction policies
- Thread-safe concurrent access
